introSection: WildCat was a steel roller coaster at Santa's Village AZoosment Park in Dundee, Illinois, USA. It originally opened in 1990 as Zyklon at Fun Spot Park in Angola, Indiana.
fullText: WildCat was a steel roller coaster at Santa's Village AZoosment Park in Dundee, Illinois, USA. It originally opened in 1990 as Zyklon at Fun Spot Park in Angola, Indiana.
